title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve is at critically low levels due to equipment failures and spillage, while Trump announced plans to control the Strait of Hormuz. This matters as both developments affect U.S. energy security and geopolitical positioning in the Middle East.
content: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.

zh.title: 美国战略石油储备达到峰值，特朗普誓言控制霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 由于设备故障和泄漏，美国战略石油储备降至危险水平，而特朗普宣布计划控制霍尔木兹海峡。这两项发展都影响了美国的能源安全和在中东的地缘政治地位。

title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
summary: The UAE denounced Iran's attacks on tankers as the U.S. conducted its third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, with Trump announcing a 20% fee on Strait of Hormuz shipping. These escalations threaten regional stability and global oil supply routes.
content: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the strait.

zh.title: 阿联酋谴责伊朗对油轮的"蛮横"攻击，美国发动新一轮打击
zh.summary: 阿联酋谴责伊朗对油轮的攻击，美国对伊朗进行了第三个连续夜晚的打击，特朗普宣布对霍尔木兹海峡航运征收20%的费用。这些升级威胁了地区稳定和全球石油供应路线。

title: US Mexican food chain Chipotle to open first restaurant in Mexico
summary: Chipotle is expanding to Mexico with its first restaurant there, marking an ambitious move despite challenges other U.S. fast food chains have faced in their cuisine's origin markets. This expansion reflects growing confidence in the brand's international appeal.
content: Other US fast food brands have struggled to succeed in the countries their dishes originated.

zh.title: 美国墨西哥餐饮连锁店Chipotle将在墨西哥开设首家餐厅
zh.summary: Chipotle正在墨西哥扩张，在那里开设首家餐厅，这是一个雄心勃勃的举措，尽管其他美国快餐连锁店在其菜系发源地市场面临挑战。这一扩张反映了人们对该品牌国际吸引力越来越有信心。

title: U.S. launches strikes against Iran for a third night, while Tehran targets Gulf neighbors
summary: The U.S. launched its third consecutive night of military strikes against Iran while Iran conducted retaliatory attacks on U.S. facilities in the Gulf region. This escalation marks a dangerous intensification of direct military conflict in the Middle East.
content: The U.S. has launched a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.

zh.title: 美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动空袭，德黑兰攻击波斯湾邻国
zh.summary: 美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动军事空袭，伊朗同时对波斯湾地区美国设施进行报复性攻击。这种升级标志着中东直接军事冲突危险加剧。

title: Oil gains over 2% as Mideast tensions and Hormuz toll prospects raise supply worries
summary: Oil prices surged over 2% following Trump's announcement of shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz and escalating Middle East tensions. The supply concerns reflect fears that the blockade could disrupt global energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to impose shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 中东紧张局势和霍尔木兹海峡通行费前景引发供应担忧，油价上涨逾2%
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布霍尔木兹海峡运费和中东紧张局势升级后，油价上涨逾2%。供应担忧反映了对封锁可能扰乱全球能源市场的担忧。

title: Stock futures are little changed as Middle East tensions escalate; traders await earnings and inflation data: Live updates
summary: Stock futures remained flat as oil prices surged amid Trump's announcement of a blockade on Iranian shipping, while traders awaited earnings and inflation data. The mixed market reaction reflects uncertainty about geopolitical impacts on broader economic growth.
content: Oil prices surged and stocks slid on Monday after President Donald Trump said he would reinstate a blockade on Iranian shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 中东紧张局势升级之际股票期货基本持平；交易员等待收益和通胀数据
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布对伊朗运输封锁导致油价飙升之际，股票期货基本持平，交易员等待收益和通胀数据。混合市场反应反映了对地缘政治对经济增长影响的不确定性。

title: Sandisk’s stock is plunging, but some analysts are getting even more bullish
summary: Despite SanDisk's stock decline, some analysts have increased their bull case with price targets implying 85% upside potential. This suggests analysts view the selloff as an attractive entry point for long-term investors.
content: One new stock-price target implies nearly 85% upside from current levels.

zh.title: 闪迪股价暴跌，但一些分析师却更加看好
zh.summary: 尽管闪迪股价下滑，但一些分析师已经提高了他们的看涨立场，目标价格暗示上涨潜力达85%。这表明分析师认为这次抛售对长期投资者来说是一个有吸引力的入场点。

title: 'Listing is a must': Chinese humanoid startups are rushing to launch IPOs
summary: Chinese humanoid robotics startups, including Shenzhen's LimX Dynamics, are accelerating IPO plans as investors seek exit opportunities in the booming sector. This reflects surging investor enthusiasm for AI and robotics technology in China.
content: Shenzhen-based LimX Dynamics is the latest humanoid company in China to raise capital in recent weeks as investors eye IPO exits.

zh.title: "上市是必须的"：中国人形机器人初创公司争相启动IPO
zh.summary: 包括深圳LimX Dynamics在内的中国人形机器人初创公司正在加快IPO计划，因为投资者在这个蓬勃发展的行业中寻求退出机会。这反映了投资者对中国人工智能和机器人技术的投资热情激增。

title: Singapore's economy expands 5.7% in the second quarter, beating expectations
summary: Singapore's economy grew 5.7% in Q2, exceeding the 5.5% forecast but slowing from the revised 6.3% growth in Q1. The solid performance maintains the region's position as a resilient economic engine despite global uncertainties.
content: The growth figure was higher than the 5.5% expected, but lower than the revised 6.3% in the first quarter.

zh.title: 新加坡经济第二季度增长5.7%，超出预期
zh.summary: 新加坡第二季度经济增长5.7%，超过5.5%的预测，但低于第一季度修正后的6.3%增长。这一强劲表现维持了该地区作为弹性经济引擎的地位，尽管存在全球不确定性。
